title: A Haunting at Silver Falls: The Return
original_title: A Haunting at Silver Falls: The Return
overview: Several years after a deadly struggle with her serial killer aunt, Jordan works to escape her troubled history. But when her aunt's revenge-seeking specter surfaces to join forces with a deranged convict, Jordan must return to the haunted town of Silver Falls for a final showdown with the ghosts of her past
